race.comment: Lots of win chances but KNIGHTS REIGN (4) is overdue to break through. Was a winner five back at Launceston then has placed in each of his four runs here since. Has placed 5/6 here and 2/2 course and distance. Has the claim and should go close again. COLONEL BOGEY (3) is yet to race beyond 1200m but is a progressive type in great form. Last start winner here over 1150m but fitter again and should feature. MEGALITA (2) is a promising type fitter for one run back from a long spell. Has good upside and is expected to improve sharply. SILVER GRANGE (9) is suited by the trip fresh and aided by the claim. Expecting a bold return. NUNKERI (8) was beaten less than a length over this course and distance last time. Has pace and will take catching.
